SELECT
  SUM(CASE WHEN T1.Segment = 'SME' THEN T1.Consumption ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN T1.Segment = 'LAM' THEN T1.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS SME_LAM_Difference,
  SUM(CASE WHEN T1.Segment = 'LAM' THEN T1.Consumption ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN T1.Segment = 'KAM' THEN T1.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS LAM_KAM_Difference,
  SUM(CASE WHEN T1.Segment = 'KAM' THEN T1.Consumption ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN T1.Segment = 'SME' THEN T1.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS KAM_SME_Difference
FROM "yearmonth" AS T1
WHERE
  T1.Date = '2013-01-01'
  AND T1.Consumption = (SELECT MIN(Consumption) FROM "yearmonth")
  AND T1.CustomerID IN (
    SELECT
      CustomerID
    FROM customers
    WHERE
      Currency = 'CZK'
  );	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
7:
SELECT
  T1.Segment,
  (
    SUM(CASE WHEN T2.Currency = 'EUR' THEN T2.Consumption ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN T2.Currency = 'EUR' THEN T2.Consumption ELSE 0 END)
  ) * 100 / (
    (
      SELECT
        SUM(CASE WHEN T2.Currency = 'EUR' THEN T2.Consumption ELSE 0 END)
      FROM yearmonth AS T2
      WHERE
        T2.Date BETWEEN '2012-01-01' AND '2013-12-31'
    )
  ) AS percentage_growth
FROM yearmonth AS T1
WHERE
  T1.Date BETWEEN '2012-01-01' AND '2013-12-31'
GROUP BY
  T1.Segment
ORDER BY
  percentage_growth DESC
LIMIT 1
UNION ALL
SELECT
  T1.Segment,
  (
    SUM(CASE WHEN T2.Currency = 'EUR' THEN T2.Consumption ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN T2.Currency = 'EUR' THEN T2.Consumption ELSE 0 END)
  ) * 100 / (
    (
      SELECT
        SUM(CASE WHEN T2.Currency = 'EUR' THEN T2.Consumption ELSE 0 END)
      FROM yearmonth AS T2
      WHERE
        T2.Date BETWEEN '2012-01-01' AND '2013-12-31'
    )
  ) AS percentage_growth
FROM yearmonth AS T1
WHERE
  T1.Date BETWEEN '2012-01-01' AND '2013-12-31'
GROUP BY
  T1.Segment
ORDER BY
  percentage_growth ASC
LIMIT 1;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
